blogParkingSafe.metaDescription: Is parking near Sarajevo Airport safe for travellers? What to check and how M Park approaches vehicle protection.
blogParkingSafe.h1: Is parking near Sarajevo Airport safe?
intro: Travellers often ask whether leaving a car near the airport is safe — especially on multi-day trips. This article gives broader context without replacing the M Park safety pillar page.
For CCTV, fencing and monitoring at our lot see the safety page — here we discuss criteria for any parking decision.

paragraphs: Safety is more than an empty slot — it includes site monitoring, clear rules, reachable contact while away, and physical separation (fencing) from through traffic.
Ask: is there written confirmation, who is accountable, is there 24/7 oversight?
Random streets lack records and accountability. Without monitoring, problems are hard to trace.
Reserved private parking reduces that risk — but verify the specific offer, not just a “secure” headline.
M Park runs 24/7 CCTV, fencing and controlled entry — technical detail on the safety page only.
Shuttle to the airport avoids informal terminal-side parking.
Book online, save confirmation, verify address and contact. Tariffs on the prices page.
If M Park protection fits, submit reservation.

faqStructured.question: Is public parking always unsafe?
faqStructured.answer: Not necessarily — but rules and crowding vary. Private parking adds agreed structure.

blogParkingVsTaxi.h1: Parking vs taxi to Sarajevo Airport
intro: Taxi vs parking depends on trip length. This article compares scenarios — M Park tariffs live only on the prices pillar.
Short same-day trips may favour taxi; multi-day travel often favours parking with included shuttle.

paragraphs: Same-day return without storing a car — count both directions and dawn availability.
Heavy luggage or kids can make one cramped ride awkward.
From day three onward taxi totals often outpace daily parking with shuttle included.
Exact KM 9/8/7 tiers on the prices page — decision logic here only.
M Park includes airport transfer — no separate ride from lot to check-in.
Shuttle flow on how airport parking works.
Most multi-day trips favour parking. Check the form estimate.
Questions: +387 61 512 152 or WhatsApp.
